name: typography
description:
A consistent text-style system (Ant Design Typography parity): typography.title renders a semantic

..

by level with a colour intent; typography.text renders inline text mapping each emphasis flag to the correct semantic element (strong->, italic->, delete->, underline->, mark->, code->, keyboard->) plus secondary/success/warning/danger colour intents; typography.paragraph renders a

with the body ramp and an optional line clamp (1..6 rows) for ellipsis truncation. Real semantic elements (heading levels, del/mark/code/kbd) so document outline + AT navigation are correct; colour is never the sole signal. Server-first PARTIAL, zero JS, CSP-clean. Complements lievit label + link.
docs: Copies the typography family (title + text + paragraph) to your JTE root at lievit/typography/. @template.lievit.typography.title(level=1..5, type=..., content=@`...`) for headings; @template.lievit.typography.text(strong|italic|underline|delete|mark|code|keyboard, type=..., content=@`...`) for inline text mapped to semantic elements; @template.lievit.typography.paragraph(type=..., clamp=0..6, content=@`...`) for body copy with optional line-clamp. The source is yours: edit freely.
